question: HDMI (High-Definition Multimedia Interface)
canonical_answer:
USB 3.1
• Released July 2013
• SuperSpeed+
• 10 Gbit/sec

USB 3.2
• Released September 2017
• SuperSpeed+ over a USB-C connector
• 10 Gbit/sec and 20 Gbit/sec
